mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (user_id, product_id, order_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT r.*, p.name AS product_name FROM review r LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(rating)), 0) FROM review WHERE product_id = #{productId}
